caption: Three people are seated in gold-colored chairs on a stage with a dark purple background illuminated by pink neon accents. On the left, a man with dark curly hair wears a white button-down shirt and grey trousers. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and black trousers. On the right, a man wears a light blue shirt under a grey blazer and grey trousers. In front of the man on the left sits a white, blocky technical object with various ports and labels. Behind the people, stylized neon text is partially visible, showing segments like "BL". Across the sequence, the individuals remain in their seats. The man on the left keeps his hands clasped in his lap. The woman shifts her posture slightly, moving her hands to gesture as she speaks. The man on the right remains relatively still, listening to the others.
